name: Gratin of Potatoes and Cheese
recipeIngredient: 4 large Idaho potatoes, peeled and sliced into thin rounds
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel the garlic cloves.
2. Peel and thinly slice the potatoes as close to serving time as possible; do not soak in cold water.
3. Mix together salt, pepper, grated cheese, and whipping cream until well combined.
4. Arrange the potato slices in a baking dish, layering with the cheese mixture.
5. Bake at 375°F (190°C) for approximately 45 minutes or until the potatoes are tender and the top is golden brown.
6. Turn off the heat and serve.
